mapper.insert: insert into kitchen_market (shop_id, market_name, market_address, business_hours, phone, latitude, longitude, stock_group_qr, stock_group_name, stock_group_notice, order_num, status, create_time) values (#{shopId}, #{marketName}, #{marketAddress}, #{businessHours}, #{phone}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{stockGroupQr}, #{stockGroupName}, #{stockGroupNotice}, #{orderNum}, #{status}, sysdate())
